tasks.label: Start Site Only
args: cd /Users/kyanozwartjes/machine_monitor && source .venv/bin/activate && { (sleep 2 && open 'http://localhost:8501') & streamlit run machine_sim.py; }

tasks.label: Stop Site + ESP Processes
args: pkill -f "streamlit run machine_sim.py" || true; pkill -f "platformio device monitor" || true

tasks.label: Start Dashboard + ESP32 Monitor
args: cd /Users/kyanozwartjes/machine_monitor && source .venv/bin/activate && { (sleep 2 && open 'http://localhost:8501') & streamlit run machine_sim.py; } & cd /Users/kyanozwartjes/Documents/PlatformIO/Projects/machine_monitoring_esp32 && /Users/kyanozwartjes/.platformio/penv/bin/platformio device monitor -b 115200

tasks.label: Upload + Start Dashboard + Monitor
args: cd /Users/kyanozwartjes/Documents/PlatformIO/Projects/machine_monitoring_esp32 && /Users/kyanozwartjes/.platformio/penv/bin/platformio run --target upload --upload-port /dev/cu.usbserial-0001 && cd /Users/kyanozwartjes/machine_monitor && source .venv/bin/activate && { (sleep 2 && open 'http://localhost:8501') & streamlit run machine_sim.py; } & cd /Users/kyanozwartjes/Documents/PlatformIO/Projects/machine_monitoring_esp32 && /Users/kyanozwartjes/.platformio/penv/bin/platformio device monitor -b 115200
